zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Standish於1472年出生在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特斯坦迪什時，她的父親Sir Alexander Standish20歲，母親Sibyl Bold32歲。她於1490年之前與John George在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年5月3日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年85歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Standish于1472年出生在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特斯坦迪什时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Standish20岁，母亲Sibyl Bold32岁。她于1490年之前与John George在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年5月3日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年85岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Standish was born in 1472, in Standish, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Alexander Standish, was 20 and her mother, Sibyl Bold, was 32. She married John George before 1490, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 May 1557, in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Standish est née en 1472, à Standish, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander Standish, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Bold, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé John George avant 1490, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 mai 1557, à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Standish 1472 in Standish, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Standish 20 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Bold 32. Sie hat vor 1490 in Gloucestershire, England John George geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Mai 1557 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato John George prima del 1490, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Standishが1472年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスタースタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Standishは20歳，母Sibyl Boldは32歳であった。1490年以前にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでJohn Georgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年5月3日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシアーエンセスターで85歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアシアーエンセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Standish(이)가 1472년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Standish(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Bold(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1490년 이전 영국 그루스스터실르에서 John George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 5월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John George antes 1490, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Standish родилась в 1472 г. в местности стандиш, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Standish было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Bold, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John George перед 1490 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 мая 1557 г. в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
